narrative:
Liberty Twp township has 2,485 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
